name: Euphoric
sceneBank: sunrise breaks over a neon festival horizon
a crowd lifts as the skyline floods with gold

name: Dark
sceneBank: red alarms pulse through an abandoned megafactory
a chrome predator wakes beneath the city
warehouse shadows close around a single strobe

name: Dreamy
sceneBank: rain floats upward through a violet midnight
distant lights drift across a sleeping ocean
memory fragments bloom in zero gravity

name: Feral
sceneBank: jungle drums ignite a concrete arena
a ritual circle erupts under stormlight
footsteps become thunder in the dust

name: Nostalgic
sceneBank: an old cassette rewinds a lost summer
tail-lights fade along a coastal highway
arcade reflections flicker in an empty mall

name: Cybernetic
sceneBank: a machine city assembles itself beat by beat
laser grids scan a rain-black boulevard
synthetic hearts synchronize in a data vault
